cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Anthony could have gone to the bookstore. Let me start by listing all the information given. First, Anthony woke up at 7am. Then, David saw him working at the office from 7am to 8am. So, between 7 and 8, Anthony was at the office. Then Leslie saw him getting coffee at the cafe from 8am to 11am. That means from 8 to 11, he was at the cafe. After that, Sarah saw him watching a movie from 1pm to 9pm. The bookstore was closed after 9pm. So, we need to find the time slot when Anthony wasn't doing any of these activities and the bookstore was still open. Let me map out his schedule: - 7am - 8am: Office (David) - 8am - 11am: Cafe (Leslie) - 1pm - 9pm: Theater (Sarah) The bookstore is closed after 9pm, so whatever time Anthony goes must be before 9pm. Now, let's see the gaps between his activities. He wakes up at 7am, then is at the office until 8am. Then from 8am to 11am at the cafe. Then there's a gap between 11am and 1pm. Then from 1pm to 9pm at the theater. So the only time Anthony is unaccounted for is between 11am and 1pm. Because after that, he's at the theater until 9pm, and before that, he's at the cafe and office. So the possible time he could go to the bookstore is 11am to 1pm. Let me check if that's one of the options. Yes, option A is 11am to 1pm. So the answer
